LanguageData.PilaHighExplosive.label: HEla
LanguageData.PilaHighExplosive.description: This shell won't miss 9 tiles away from its target (It might miss 2 but that's still valid).
LanguageData.PilaHighExplosive.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.PilaHighExplosive.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.PilaHighExplosive.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.PilaHighIncendiary.label: HIla
LanguageData.PilaHighIncendiary.description: No, there is no baby to reveal its gender with.
LanguageData.PilaHighIncendiary.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.PilaHighIncendiary.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.PilaHighIncendiary.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.PilaEMP.label: MPila
LanguageData.PilaEMP.description: Five feet apart from mechanoids (or whatever it is you're aiming at).
LanguageData.PilaEMP.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.PilaEMP.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.PilaEMP.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.PilaSmoke.label: Smola
LanguageData.PilaSmoke.description: Unfortunately, it is not, in fact, smokeleaf.
LanguageData.PilaSmoke.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.PilaSmoke.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.PilaSmoke.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.PilaFirefoam.label: Fola
LanguageData.PilaFirefoam.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.PilaFirefoam.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.PilaFirefoam.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.PilaAntigrain.label: Sayonala
LanguageData.PilaAntigrain.description: You can barely feel the singe.
LanguageData.PilaAntigrain.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.PilaAntigrain.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.PilaAntigrain.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.PilumHE_Thrown.label: pilum with HE shell on the tip
LanguageData.PilumHI_Thrown.label: pilum with incendiary shell on the tip
LanguageData.PilumEMP_Thrown.label: pilum with EMP shell on the tip
LanguageData.PilumSmoke_Thrown.label: pilum with smoke shell on the tip
LanguageData.PilumFirefoam_Thrown.label: pilum with smoke shell on the tip
LanguageData.PilumAntigrain_Thrown.label: pilum with antigrain shell on the tip
